title: Ordinance Enacting the Supplemental Budget for the Year 2022 in the Amount of Fifteen Million One Hundred Fifteen Thousand Three Hundred Twenty-eight Pesos and 56/100 (P 15,115,328.56) Covering Various Expenditures for Unappropriated Balance Government Equity in the Amount of Six Million Eight Hundred Seventy-one Thousand Nine Hundred Pesos (P 6,871,900.00); Reversion From Continuing Appropriations in the Amount of Seven Million Eight Hundred Seventy-two Thousand Six Hundred Pesos and 00/100
